ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., PAST SALE) */,
  "sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "property_type" INTEGER /* Type of property (e.g., Townhouse, Single Family Residential) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the property */,
  "baths" REAL /* Number of baths in the property */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location of the property (e.g., Laurel Heights, Oakland) */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days the property was on the market */,
  "price_per_square_foot" REAL /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "hoa_month" REAL /* Monthly HOA fees */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., Sold) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the property */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs for images of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type FOREIGN KEY ("property_type") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_houses" (
  "open_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open house */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the open house */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the open house */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the open house */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the open house */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the open house */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_houses_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information on the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the URL content */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the URL record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mls" (
  "mls_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MLS entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the MLS entry */,
  "mls_number" TEXT /* MLS number of the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the MLS record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mls_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the property as favorite */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property marked as favorite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the property was marked as a favorite */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the favorite entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
